name: Creating a Ticket
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can create tickets automatically from incoming customer emails or manually for phone and walk-in requests, ensuring every customer inquiry is properly tracked and managed. This helps maintain consistent service quality by capturing all customer interactions in a centralized system where agents can work on them efficiently."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Setting up automatic ticket creation from support email addresses streamlines your workflow and reduces manual data entry, while manual ticket creation ensures phone and walk-in requests receive the same level of attention. This unified approach to ticket management helps improve response time and ensures no customer inquiry falls through the cracks."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Service Cloud supports both automatic and manual ticket creation."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can set up your email address in Service Cloud so that any incoming customer query or complaint is automatically created as a ticket. To learn about setting up your support email addresses, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Setting-Up-Support-Email-Addresses","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Setting Up Support Email Addresses","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can also create tickets manually for any walk-ins or over-the-phone requests by simply filling out a form."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Creating a Ticket Manually"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To create a new ticket manually, follow the steps below:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"1. In Navigation, go to "},{"text":"TICKETS","bold":true},{"text":". Then, on the "},{"text":"Tickets","bold":true},{"text":" page, from the "},{"text":"NEW","bold":true},{"text":" menu, select "},{"text":"New Ticket","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NewTicketNav.05T5g00000txmVUEAY.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NewTicketNav.05T5g00000txmVUEAY.png","name":"User-added image","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":525,"width":700}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"2. On the "},{"text":"New Ticket","bold":true},{"text":" page, fill in the ticket details:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Contacts","bold":true},{"text":": Select the customer from the list of contacts. If the customer is not available in the application, you can quickly add the contact using the "},{"text":"Add New Contact ","bold":true},{"text":"button on the page."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Type","bold":true},{"text":": Select a type for the ticket. Service Cloud provides a set of built-in ticket types and enables you to create custom ones."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Channel","bold":true},{"text":": Select the channel through which you received the request. By default, the request received is via “"},{"text":"Inbound call","bold":true},{"text":".”"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Status","bold":true},{"text":": Select the ticket status. By default, the ticket status is “"},{"text":"New","bold":true},{"text":".”"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Priority","bold":true},{"text":": Select the ticket priority. By default, the ticket priority is “"},{"text":"Low","bold":true},{"text":".”"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Agent","bold":true},{"text":": Select the service agent to assign the ticket."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Tags:","bold":true},{"text":" Choose an existing tag or create a new one from the dropdown to classify a particular ticket. You can assign multiple tags to a single ticket."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Subject","bold":true},{"text":": Enter a subject for the ticket indicating what the inquiry or issue is about."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1ZFORUE3BOS2/ticket0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1ZFORUE3BOS2/ticket0.png","name":"ticket0.png","type":"image/png","size":171993,"width":2880,"height":1373,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F1ZFORUE3BOS2%2Fticket0.png","active":true,"mediaID":1405,"dateInserted":"2025-11-07T09:52:04+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"3. Add additional details regarding the query within the description field. Use tools such as fonts, alignment, bullets, links, etc. to format your content accordingly."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1MC76O9QW2SQ/ticket1.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1MC76O9QW2SQ/ticket1.png","name":"ticket1.png","type":"image/png","size":113642,"width":2848,"height":904,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F1MC76O9QW2SQ%2Fticket1.png","active":true,"mediaID":1406,"dateInserted":"2025-11-07T09:52:27+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"4. To upload supported file formats such as images, documents, archives, and media files, click on "},{"text":"Attach File","bold":true},{"text":". Drag and drop the file from your device folder or click on "},{"text":"Upload","bold":true},{"text":". The max file size permitted is 5 MB, and you can upload up to 10 files for every ticket. The uploaded files can be looked at and removed by clicking on the "},{"text":"Preview","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"Delete","bold":true},{"text":" icons."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/8OUYTL3KUAMQ/ticket2.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/8OUYTL3KUAMQ/ticket2.png","name":"ticket2.png","type":"image/png","size":261681,"width":2845,"height":1288,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F8OUYTL3KUAMQ%2Fticket2.png","active":true,"mediaID":1407,"dateInserted":"2025-11-07T09:52:55+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"5. Once you have finished filling out a ticket, click on "},{"text":"Create","bold":true},{"text":". After the ticket is created, it appears on the "},{"text":"Tickets","bold":true},{"text":" page, where the assigned agent can start working on it."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ANVHCQLVR8LR/ticket3.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ANVHCQLVR8LR/ticket3.png","name":"ticket3.png","type":"image/png","size":186256,"width":2845,"height":1429,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FANVHCQLVR8LR%2Fticket3.png","active":true,"mediaID":1408,"dateInserted":"2025-11-07T09:53:15+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Related
